steps.name: Create ESLint config for TypeScript + React Native
steps.criteria: eslint.config.mjs created with TypeScript parser, React Native plugin. `npx eslint . --ext .ts,.tsx --max-warnings 0` exits 0 (or exits clean with reasonable rules). Install any needed ESLint dev dependencies.

steps.name: Fix or remove dependency-cruiser step from CI
steps.criteria: Either create .dependency-cruiser.cjs with ports-and-adapters rules OR remove the architecture enforcement step from ci.yml. CI workflow should pass end-to-end.
